title: merge --dry-run --json missing-branch blocker
description: Schema for spec-kitty merge --dry-run --json output when the expected mission branch is absent (FR-016, FR-017). The ready field is false; blocker, expected_branch, and remediation are required.

ready.description: Always false when any blocker is present.

blocker.description: Stable identifier for this blocker type.

expected_branch.description: Full local branch name that was expected to exist.

remediation.description: Complete shell command the user can copy-paste to create the missing branch.
